chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-778 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.06.2023 Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. M/s Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with SIP Nabi Bux SHO PS Jam Nawaz Ali. ------ IO present submits that petitioner was medically examined by the board which has opined that she is between 18 and 19 years of age and after recording her statement the case has been disposed of in “C” class and the Magistrate concerned has approved such summary. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
